items.question: What is UGC content?
items.answer: UGC (User-Generated Content style) is social-native content that feels authentic while still being professionally produced for your brand goals.

items.question: Do you work with brands outside Belgium?
items.answer: Yes. Based in Belgium, Denise works with both local and international brands, remotely or on-site when required.

items.question: In which languages can you create content?
items.answer: French, Dutch and English — both spoken and written content.

items.question: What types of events do you cover?
items.answer: Weddings, hospitality experiences, venue showcases, private events, brand launches and premium activations.

items.question: How fast is delivery?
items.answer: Turnaround depends on scope, but same-day and fast-delivery options are available for live events and urgent campaigns.

items.question: Do you offer raw footage?
items.answer: Yes, raw footage can be added depending on package and usage needs.

items.question: Can content be used for paid ads?
items.answer: Yes. Ad usage rights can be included in your agreement, with options tailored to campaign duration and channels.

about.title: About Denise
about.description: Creative, premium-oriented and multilingual. Denise helps brands translate their image into social-native content people genuinely watch.
about.positioningText: UGC Creator & Event Content Creator for premium brands in Belgium.
about.bio: Based in Belgium, Denise works in French, Dutch and English. Her approach combines creative direction, clean visual storytelling and platform-native editing to deliver content that supports both brand image and social performance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we collect and use your personal data.
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Content by Denise (contentbydenise.com) collects, uses and protects your personal data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: Denise Fabiano, operating as Content by Denise, is the data controller for personal data collected through this website. Contact: denise_fabiano@outlook.com

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.content: We collect the following data when you submit the contact form: your name, email address, company/brand name, Instagram or website URL, project type, desired date, and your message. We do not collect data through cookies beyond essential analytics.

sections.title: 3. How we use your data
sections.content: Your data is used exclusively to respond to your inquiry and to provide the requested content creation services. We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: 4. Data retention
sections.content: We retain your contact data for as long as necessary to process your inquiry and any resulting service agreement, and no longer than 3 years thereafter.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
sections.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at denise_fabiano@outlook.com.

sections.title: 6. Analytics
sections.content: This website uses Google Analytics 4 to understand traffic and user behaviour. Analytics data is anonymised and does not personally identify you.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For any privacy-related questions, contact: denise_fabiano@outlook.com

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.description: Terms governing the use of the Content by Denise website.
termsOfUse.intro:
These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the Content by Denise website, accessible at: https://contentbydenise.com.

By browsing the website, the user accepts these Terms of Use.

sections.title: Purpose of the website
sections.content: The Content by Denise website presents the services of Denise Fabiano as a UGC and Event Content Creator. It allows users to:
list: get in touch via WhatsApp or email

sections.title: Website access
sections.content: The website is freely accessible to any user with internet access. Content by Denise strives to keep the website accessible but does not guarantee permanent, continuous or error-free access.

sections.title: User obligations
sections.content: The user agrees to use the website lawfully and in good faith. The following are prohibited:
list: disrupting the functioning of the website
copying or exploiting content without authorisation
using forms to send abusive, fraudulent or unlawful messages

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.content: Website content is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction or exploitation without prior authorisation is prohibited.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: The website may contain links to external platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, WhatsApp or other third-party websites. Content by Denise is not responsible for the content or functioning of these external platforms.

sections.title: Personal data
sections.content: Use of the website may involve the collection of personal data, in particular through the contact form. Processing details are available in the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Modification of the terms
sections.content: Content by Denise reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Users are encouraged to check this page regularly.

sections.title: Applicable law
sections.content: Applicable law: [To be completed]

sections.title: Services offered
sections.content: Content by Denise offers in particular:
list: Vertical videos for Instagram, TikTok, Reels and digital campaigns
Visual content for beauty, lifestyle, hospitality and premium event brands

sections.title: Quotes and orders
sections.content:
Every service is preceded by a discussion to define: client needs, expected content type, deliverables, timelines, usage rights, options and pricing.

An order is confirmed upon written acceptance of the quote or commercial proposal.

sections.title: Pricing
sections.content: Prices are not publicly displayed on the website. Each project receives a custom quote based on: service type, number of content pieces, project complexity, shoot location, timelines, usage rights and specific client needs.

sections.title: Payment
sections.content: Payment terms are specified in the quote. Unless stated otherwise, a deposit may be requested before work begins.

sections.title: Delivery timelines
sections.content: Timelines are defined per project and confirmed at order validation. They may be adjusted in case of brief changes, delays in providing required materials, special shoot conditions or force majeure.

sections.title: Client obligations
sections.content: The client agrees to provide: a clear brief, objectives, brand guidelines, products to film if needed, technical constraints, rights and authorisations, and location/schedule information for events.
sections.note: Any delay in providing these elements may result in a schedule shift.

sections.title: Revisions
sections.content: The number of included revisions is defined in the quote. Additional requests may be subject to extra charges.

sections.title: Content delivery
sections.content: Content is delivered via download link, shared drive, email or another agreed method. Delivery formats are specified in the quote.

sections.title: Usage rights
sections.content: Usage rights are defined in the quote. Any use not initially agreed upon — including paid advertising, sponsored campaigns, extended use, third-party transfer or use beyond the agreed duration — requires a supplementary agreement.

sections.title: Cancellation and postponement
sections.content: Cancellation or postponement terms are defined in the quote. In case of late cancellation by the client, costs already incurred or the deposit may remain due.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: Content by Denise is not liable for: modifications requested after validation, misuse of content, commercial results, third-party platform unavailability, or social media platform constraints.

sections.title: No guarantee of commercial results
sections.content: Content by Denise does not guarantee any specific level of views, sales, engagement, conversions or advertising performance.

sections.title: Personal data
sections.content: Data collected during commercial exchanges is processed in accordance with the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Applicable law and disputes
sections.content:
Applicable law: [To be completed]
Competent jurisdiction: [To be completed]

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.description: How Content by Denise uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookiePolicy.intro: The Content by Denise website may use cookies or similar technologies to ensure its proper functioning, measure audience and improve the user experience.

sections.title: What is a cookie?
sections.content: A cookie is a small file placed on the user's device when visiting a website. It can recognise a browser, remember preferences or measure website traffic.

sections.title: Necessary cookies
sections.content: These cookies are required for the website to function properly. They do not always require user consent when strictly necessary.

sections.title: Analytics cookies
sections.content: If Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager or another measurement tool is used, the website may place cookies to analyse traffic. User consent may be required depending on the tool configuration.

sections.title: Third-party cookies
sections.content: The website may contain links or integrations with:
sections.note: These services may place their own cookies when the user interacts with them.

sections.title: Consent management
sections.content: If non-essential cookies are used, a consent banner will allow the user to:

sections.title: Retention period
sections.content: Cookie retention depends on the type of cookie and tool used. Durations to be completed based on tools actually installed: [To be completed]

sections.title: Manage cookie preferences
sections.content: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via your browser settings or via the consent banner.
